caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Small Craft Conditions Near Roatan
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan is experiencing brisk east-southeast winds of 22 kt with 6.2 ft seas and a dominant 9 s ENE swell, accompanied by 100% rain probability. I expect small-boat operations at Roatan's port to be restricted under Small Craft Advisory conditions for wind, while Grenada reports lighter 12 kt winds and generally lower seas but should monitor for localized downpours.

mediterranean.headline: Mykonos Sees 22 kt Winds, 5.4 ft Seas
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing northerly winds up to 22 kt, seas to 5.4 ft with a dominant NNE swell at 7 s, and less than 10% rain probability. I advise small craft to avoid exposed waters around Mykonos given these conditions, while Venice remains much lighter with winds near 13 kt.
